lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me the basics of mining please?

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: As you're already here, have a pick so that you can mine the rocks around me.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: I'd give you a pick to mine the rocks around me, but you don't have room in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: As you already have a pick, you can mine the rocks around me.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: You can tell the ore you'll get from a rock by looking at it. The colour of the rock helps, too.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: To mine, simply click on the rock to mine it, while you've got a pickaxe with you.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: When you have a full inventory, take it to the bank. There's a bank on the roof of the castle in Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I already know about the basics of mining, got any tips?

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: As you're already here, have a pick so that you can mine the rocks around me.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: I'd give you a pick to mine the rocks around me, but you don't have room in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: As you already have a pick, you can mine the rocks around me.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: You can get different rocks in different places throughout the land, explore and find them.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: You could start by traveling to the Al Kharid mine. Follow the path north and pay the 10 coins toll to go through the gate. Head north after passing through the gate and you will find the mine.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: Be careful though, the scorpions in the mine will attack you.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: I could show you where Al Kharid mine is on your map if you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any advice for an advanced miner?

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: As you're already here, have a pick so that you can mine the rocks around me.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: I'd give you a pick to mine the rocks around me, but you don't have room in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: As you already have a pick, you can mine the rocks around me.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: Investigate the mining guild, the entrance to this is in the east of Falador down some steps. It could be most useful to you!

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: You might also like to check out the coal mine west of Seers' village. This will enable you to use the coal trucks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, I'll remember that.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: I could show you where either of the places are on your map if you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me where the mining guild is?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me where the coal mine is?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: Investigate the mining guild, the entrance to this is in the east of Falador down some steps. It could be most useful to you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, I'll remember that.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: I could show you where the mining guild is on your map if you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: Oh yes, if you haven't already, speak to Doric who can be found around the anvils north of Falador. I'm sure he can help you out.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: You could investigate the Dig Site east of Varrock, I'm sure you'll find something rewarding there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about different rocks and picks.

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: Ok then.. here goes....

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: You can make all sorts of things from clay, if you have the crafting skill. Rune Essence is used for magic to cast spells.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm giving Zanik here a tour of Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Zanik
lines.text: I'm Zanik of the Dorgeshuun! Pleased to meet you!

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: Hello there, Zanik! You look like you know your iron from your silver!

lines.speaker: Zanik
lines.text: Of course I do! I've mined lots of iron and silver in the Dorgeshuun mines!

lines.speaker: Mining tutor
lines.text: You don't look like you need any help, then. What about you, [player name]?
